reflection.summary: User requested a list of available tools, and the agent provided a comprehensive categorized listing.
lessons: Tool listing requests are straightforward informational queries — no need for caveman brevity here; structured formatting (categories, bold names, short descriptions) is the right approach.
Ending with an open offer ('Anything specific you need?') is appropriate for tool-listing responses to encourage follow-up.
recommendations: None needed — response was well-structured and complete.
